name: canonical-n10
description: Stratified n=10 sample of seeds drawn from positions 0, 10, 20, ..., 90 of the n=100 deterministic baseline P(57) MDP distribution. This is the seed set used for Phase 1 multi-seed screening on 2026-04-28 (post-determinism cutover). Designed so each pair-comparison covers the full baseline-variance range, making pooled mean ΔP(57) an unbiased estimator of the underlying effect.
stratum: positions 0-90 every 10th (i.e. seeds 1, 11, 21, ..., 91 of the rank-ordered baseline distribution)
